channel.title: Irvirty News RSS
channel.description: These are news headlines from other sources on various topics. (Maybe with commentary or my own news.)

item.title: Google Search confirms it does not support the results per page parameter
item.description: Google Search confirms it does not support the results per page parameter https://searchengineland.com/google-search-confirms-it-does-not-support-the-results-per-page-parameter-462244

item.title: Amazon settles lawsuit over Prime subscriptions : NPR
item.description: Amazon settles lawsuit over Prime subscriptions : NPR https://www.npr.org/2025/09/25/nx-s1-5551026/amazon-prime-lawsuit-ftc-settlement

item.title: Judge approves $1.5 billion copyright settlement between AI company Anthropic and authors | AP News
item.description: Judge approves $1.5 billion copyright settlement between AI company Anthropic and authors | AP News https://apnews.com/article/anthropic-authors-copyright-judge-artificial-intelligence-9643064e847a5e88ef6ee8b620b3a44c

item.title: Unfortunately, Bluesky is unavailable in Mississippi right now, due to a new state law that requires age verification for all users.
item.description: Unfortunately, Bluesky is unavailable in Mississippi right now, due to a new state law that requires age verification for all users. https://bsky.app/profile/bsky.app/post/3lwzadikbrc2u

item.title: Imgur Blocked in UK: Why It Happened and How to Unblock It
item.description: Imgur Blocked in UK: Why It Happened and How to Unblock It https://cybernews.com/uk/how-to-use-vpn/imgur-blocked-in-uk-why-it-happened-and-how-to-unblock-it/

item.title: How Electronic Arts' $55 billion go-private deal could impact the video game industry | AP News
item.description: How Electronic Arts' $55 billion go-private deal could impact the video game industry | AP News https://apnews.com/article/electronic-arts-buyout-what-to-know-ea6d403811e6ebab0b96ab772f5e7d67

item.title: Mozilla introduces visual search powered by Google Lens on Firefox desktop | AlternativeTo "Google must be set as the browser’s default search engine."
item.description: Mozilla introduces visual search powered by Google Lens on Firefox desktop | AlternativeTo "Google must be set as the browser’s default search engine."https://alternativeto.net/news/2025/9/mozilla-introduces-visual-search-powered-by-google-lens-on-firefox-desktop/

item.title: Activists launch hunger strikes outside DeepMind and Anthropic offices over race to build advanced AI | TechSpot
item.description: Activists launch hunger strikes outside DeepMind and Anthropic offices over race to build advanced AI | TechSpot https://www.techspot.com/news/109368-activists-launch-hunger-strikes-outside-anthropic-deepmind-offices.html

item.title:
OBS Studio 32 is now available!
This release comes with our initial version of the Plugin Manager! We've also made additions and optimizations to NVIDIA RTX filters, and added hybrid MOV support.
item.description:
OBS Studio 32 is now available!
This release comes with our initial version of the Plugin Manager! We've also made additions and optimizations to NVIDIA RTX filters, and added hybrid MOV support. https://bsky.app/profile/obsproject.com/post/3lzrij2yie22j

item.title: Firefox 143.0, See All New Features, Updates and Fixes
item.description: Firefox 143.0, See All New Features, Updates and Fixes https://www.firefox.com/en-US/firefox/143.0/releasenotes/

item.title: Google's AI Mode expands globally, adds new agentic features | TechCrunch
item.description: Google's AI Mode expands globally, adds new agentic features | TechCrunch https://techcrunch.com/2025/08/21/googles-ai-mode-expands-globally-adds-new-agentic-features/

item.title: Nano Banana! Image editing in Gemini just got a major upgrade
item.description: Nano Banana! Image editing in Gemini just got a major upgrade https://blog.google/intl/en-mena/product-updates/explore-get-answers/nano-banana-image-editing-in-gemini-just-got-a-major-upgrade/
